'''鈭歴h-m-dh-z''' ('''kashamdhezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wordwrap|wordwrap]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-m-dh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wordwrap|wordwrap]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-m-dh-z
|-
! Lemma
| kashamdhezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishamdhezoko|thishamdhezoko]] || [[word:jishamdhezoko|jishamdhezoko]] || [[word:shishamdhezoko|shishamdhezoko]] || [[word:kishamdhezoko|kishamdhezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshamdhezoko|thoshamdhezoko]] || [[word:joshamdhezoko|joshamdhezoko]] || [[word:shoshamdhezoko|shoshamdhezoko]] || [[word:koshamdhezoko|koshamdhezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
